description: Submission view: progression and reference tabs use full width; progressions in flex row (max 4 per row). Fix Radix hydration mismatch by deferring Tabs and dropdowns until after mount.
Add Vercel Speed Insights for Core Web Vitals reporting in Vercel dashboard.
Enable Next.js 16 Partial Prerendering (PPR) with cache components for faster page loads and improved SEO. Public pages now serve a static HTML shell instantly with dynamic content streamed in.
Convert data fetchers (prompts, exhibits, exhibitions, creators, museums, short URLs, site settings) to use cache directive with granular cache tags and revalidation on mutations.
Extract page components into cached and dynamic layers with Suspense boundaries for PPR compatibility (home page, creator profile, critiques, breadcrumbs).
Speed up anonymous homepage loads with a lightweight public shell, prioritized lead artwork loading, and reduced non-critical route prefetching.
